release_summary: CLV calibration: sigma-normalized deadzone + round-aware decay (BBM7 + Puppy + BigDog). Per Chris's feedback that ranks should matter more late and CLV less, plus the JCM-vs-Rachaad-White case where sub-pick ADP noise overrode a 28-rank gap. Two new global knobs: `clv_deadzone_sigma=0.3` mutes CLV when the value/reach gap is within 0.3σ (kills noise floor), and `clv_round_decay_strength=0.5` scales CLV impact by `(1-s) + s × earlyRoundPriorityMult(round)` so late-round CLV shrinks while early-round arbitrage stays meaningful. Cross-contest: BBM7 +$2353 prize / -0.67 rd1, Puppy +$150 prize / -0.67 rd1, BigDog +$6867 prize / -2.15 rd1 — all accept a small floor-for-ceiling trade. v2.1.10 PC-stack wins reinforced: Meyers/Wilson margin grew from 0.01 to 5.64.
